title: Lawyers Google Maps Scraper
description: Scrapes lawyers and law firms from Google Maps with deep enrichment — emails, socials, practice areas, fee structure, languages spoken, services list, review sentiment, online-booking / free-consultation detection, metro classification, and firm-size classification.

searchTerms.title: Search terms
searchTerms.description: Lawyer / attorney categories to search for (e.g. personal injury lawyer, immigration attorney, divorce lawyer, criminal defense, real estate attorney)
searchTerms.sectionDescription: Enter search terms and locations. Each search term is combined with each location.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Cities, regions, or countries to search in (e.g. New York, USA or London, UK)

maxResults.title: Max results per search
maxResults.description: Maximum number of lawyers / firms to scrape in total across all search term + location combinations

minRating.title: Minimum rating filter
minRating.description: Only include lawyers / firms with this Google rating or above (0 = no filter)

enrichEmails.title: Extract emails
enrichEmails.description: Visit each firm's website and extract the best contact email (homepage + /contact fallback). Prefers intake@ / consult@ / contact@ over generic addresses.
enrichEmails.sectionDescription: Enable or disable enrichment features. Each enrichment adds extra data and run time.

enrichSocials.title: Extract social media links
enrichSocials.description: Extract Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X/Twitter profile links from the firm's website

enrichLawyer.title: Lawyer enrichment
enrichLawyer.description: Extract practice areas (immigration, PI, family, etc.), fee structure (contingency / hourly / flat / free consultation), languages spoken, services list, and review sentiment analysis

enrichLawyerNiche.title: Niche classification
enrichLawyerNiche.description: Detect online booking (Calendly, Acuity, Clio Grow), free-consultation availability, metro area, and firm size (solo / small / mid / large)

proxyConfig.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfig.description: Residential proxies recommended for high-volume runs to avoid Google Maps blocks
